title: IDs Curios Access
description: Allows access to the curios inventory via mods such as IDs.
body: # IDs Curios Access English | [日本語](https://github.com/npg418/IDsCuriosAccess/blob/main/README.ja.md) A mod that enables other mods to handle curios inventory! The mod name has "IDs" in it, but it may work with other mods too. (I've only tested this mod with [IDs](https://modrinth.com/mod/integrated-dynamics)) Let's rob your opponents of everything they have, even their curios inventory!
